/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX14.0.sdk -bundle -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -Xlinker -undefined -Xlinker dynamic_lookup -flto -o tensor_slow.cpython-311-darwin.so CMakeFiles/tensor_slow.dir/bindings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tensor_slow.dir/tensor.cpp.o
